---
title: Introducing `shinyds`
author: 
  - name: novica
    url: "https://discindo.org/authors/novica"
date: "2026-06-09"
categories:
  - R
  - shiny
  - designsystemet
description: "Designsystemet - Norwegian government's shared design system -  components for Shiny"
execute:
  eval: false
image: "images/shinyds.svg"
---

[![](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/J3J8133RYV)

[Designsystemet](https://designsystemet.no/en/intro/about-the-design-system) is
a shared toolkit of UI components and guidelines for developing digital services
in Norway. It is free to use and it is a
[registered](https://www.digitalpublicgoods.net/r/designsystemet) Digital Public
Good.

The usual way to use Designsystemet is through the provided packages that fit
very well in the standard web development work - HTML/CSS/JS or with frameworks
like React.

With `shinyds` now you can use the same components with R and Shiny. The package
is on CRAN so you can install it the usual way, or you can checkout the GitHub
repository for the [code](https://github.com/novica/shinyds),
[documentation](https://novica.github.io/shinyds/), and
[examples](https://novica-faitful.share.connect.posit.cloud/).

`shinyds` is done with help from an LLM, and there may be some untested edges.
Comments, bug reports, usage examples, and other contributions are welcome.
